appliedUpdates.description: Added critical setup requirements section documenting Python environment issues and dependency installation steps

setupIssues.summary: Server startup blocked by missing Python dependencies and Python environment issues
details: Attempted to start FastAPI server multiple times - process exits immediately
Discovered uvicorn and other dependencies from requirements.txt are not installed
Python pip commands fail, suggesting Python environment issues
System is using Windows Store Python (C:\Users\15849\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps\python3.exe)
Windows Store Python has known limitations with pip and package installation
No virtual environment (venv/ or .venv/) found in project root
Port 8000 never enters LISTENING state - server never successfully starts
resolutionSteps: Check for and activate virtual environment if it exists
Install dependencies: python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
If pip fails, use alternative Python installation (not Windows Store Python)
Consider using Anaconda/Miniconda or python.org installation
Verify installation with: python -c "import uvicorn; print('OK')"
Start server and verify port 8000 is LISTENING before spawning validators
